visa_types.name: Private Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa application form (filled out through the visa application portal –
 
www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az (https://www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az/)
).
- Passport or other travel document (a validity period of a passport or other travel document should exceed a validity period of an expected visa at least by 8 to 10 months) and copies of their main pages.
- Two color photographs (3x4cm) matching with biometric identification requirements.
- A copy of medical insurance certificate.
- Document certifying payment of a state fee.
- A notarial authenticated invitation letter from the inviting party (on the bases of a verbal note addressed to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Azerbaijan, extended to the family members or relatives of the personnel of the Embassy of the Arab Republic of Egypt in the Republic of Azerbaijan); or legalized from ASAN XIDMAT.
- A copy of the identity document of the inviting person.
- A copy of the document validating the degree of kinship when the invited party is a family member of the inviting party - a citizen of the Republic of Azerbaijan, a foreigner or stateless person permanently residing in the Republic of Azerbaijan, labor migrant, foreigner or stateless person who studies in the Republic of Azerbaijan with the temporary residence permit.
- A notarized copy of a birth certificate, a permission of parents or a legitimate representative and copies of identification documents are required for issuance of visa to foreigners and stateless persons under 18 holders of a passport travelling without attendance of his/her parent or a legitimate representative.
- For foreigner applicants must have a residence for at least 6 months in Egypt.
- Important notice: this visa type is for a first degree relative only.
Important notice:
- No multiple entry for this visa type.
- Any documents requiring translation will be translated by the Azerbaijan embassy before submitting the documents to VFS.
- When filling out the application, all required images must be uploaded correctly. The images should be clear, properly oriented, and must not be tilted or upside down.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Please note that VFS Global offers an additional optional service for visa applicants in Egypt. VFS charges an extra service fee for this service, to be paid by the applicant.
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge of 1265 EGP (Inc. VAT)
- Visa fees will be charged in USD.

[aze > egy > en > Visa Fee]

- Embassy visa Fee
- Description:
- To be paid to Embassy bank account.
- (In case of group individually for each applicant)
- Bank Name: QNB Al Ahli
- Account Number: 20314092243-46
- Account Currency: USD
- All fees are non-refundable.
- For the official visa fees charged by the Azerbaijan government see below.

- The prescribed fee for the processing of multiple-entry work visa applications submitted by the citizens of the United States of America is 190 US dollars, and for other multiple-entry visa applications for diverse purposes, the fee is set 160 US dollars.
- The fee for the processing of multiple-entry visa applications of the citizens of the Republic of Korea is 150 US dollars.
- The prescribed fee for the processing of multiple-entry visa applications of the citizens of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan is 200 US dollars.
- The fee for the processing of visa applications submitted by citizens of the Swiss Confederation and the Kingdom of Norway is 35 euros.
- In accordance with bilateral intergovernmental agreements, a visa-free regime is applicable for citizens of the relevant foreign countries holding diplomatic or service (or official/special) passports (
Annex 1
);
- In accordance with bilateral intergovernmental and multilateral international agreements, a visa-free regime is being applied for citizens of the relevant foreign countries holding diplomatic, service (or official/special) and ordinary passports (
Annex 2
);
visa_types.processing_time:
Visa applications are processed within 15 days from the date of submission (this provision is regulated by the national legislation of the Republic of Azerbaijan)
Visa applications from citizens of European Union member states are processed within 3 calendar days from the date of document submission.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category, kindly refer to the information sheet of documents required.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category, kindly refer to the information sheet of documents required. 

## Visa Fees
Please note that VFS Global offers an additional optional service for visa applicants in Egypt. VFS charges an extra service fee for this service, to be paid by the applicant.
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge of 1265 EGP (Inc. VAT)
- Visa fees will be charged in USD.

[aze > egy > en > Visa Fee]

- Embassy visa Fee
- Description:
- To be paid to Embassy bank account.
- (In case of group individually for each applicant)
- Bank Name: QNB Al Ahli
- Account Number: 20314092243-46
- Account Currency: USD
- All fees are non-refundable.
- For the official visa fees charged by the Azerbaijan government see below.

- The prescribed fee for the processing of multiple-entry work visa applications submitted by the citizens of the United States of America is 190 US dollars, and for other multiple-entry visa applications for diverse purposes, the fee is set 160 US dollars.
- The fee for the processing of multiple-entry visa applications of the citizens of the Republic of Korea is 150 US dollars.
- The prescribed fee for the processing of multiple-entry visa applications of the citizens of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan is 200 US dollars.
- The fee for the processing of visa applications submitted by citizens of the Swiss Confederation and the Kingdom of Norway is 35 euros.
- In accordance with bilateral intergovernmental agreements, a visa-free regime is applicable for citizens of the relevant foreign countries holding diplomatic or service (or official/special) passports (
Annex 1
);
- In accordance with bilateral intergovernmental and multilateral international agreements, a visa-free regime is being applied for citizens of the relevant foreign countries holding diplomatic, service (or official/special) and ordinary passports (
Annex 2
);

## Documents Required

- Visa application form (filled out through the visa application portal –
 
www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az (https://www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az/)
).
- Passport or other travel document (a validity period of a passport or other travel document should exceed a validity period of an expected visa at least by 8 to 10 months) and copies of their main pages.
- Two color photographs (3x4cm) matching with biometric identification requirements.
- A copy of medical insurance certificate.
- Document certifying payment of a state fee.
- A notarial authenticated invitation letter from the inviting party (on the bases of a verbal note addressed to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Azerbaijan, extended to the family members or relatives of the personnel of the Embassy of the Arab Republic of Egypt in the Republic of Azerbaijan); or legalized from ASAN XIDMAT.
- A copy of the identity document of the inviting person.
- A copy of the document validating the degree of kinship when the invited party is a family member of the inviting party - a citizen of the Republic of Azerbaijan, a foreigner or stateless person permanently residing in the Republic of Azerbaijan, labor migrant, foreigner or stateless person who studies in the Republic of Azerbaijan with the temporary residence permit.
- A notarized copy of a birth certificate, a permission of parents or a legitimate representative and copies of identification documents are required for issuance of visa to foreigners and stateless persons under 18 holders of a passport travelling without attendance of his/her parent or a legitimate representative.
- For foreigner applicants must have a residence for at least 6 months in Egypt.
- Important notice: this visa type is for a first degree relative only.
Important notice:
- No multiple entry for this visa type.
- Any documents requiring translation will be translated by the Azerbaijan embassy before submitting the documents to VFS.
- When filling out the application, all required images must be uploaded correctly. The images should be clear, properly oriented, and must not be tilted or upside down.

## Processing Time
Visa applications are processed within 15 days from the date of submission (this provision is regulated by the national legislation of the Republic of Azerbaijan)
Visa applications from citizens of European Union member states are processed within 3 calendar days from the date of document submission.

visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa application form (filled out through the visa application portal –
 
www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az (https://www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az/)
).
- Passport or other travel document (a validity period of a passport or other travel document should exceed a validity period of an expected visa at least by 8 to 10 months) and copies of their main pages.
- Two color photographs (3x4cm) matching with biometric identification requirements.
- A copy of medical insurance certificate.
- Document certifying payment of a state fee.
- Tourism voucher or travel itinerary, a passenger ticket, along with a document confirming accommodation arrangements in hotels, campsites, tourist bases or similar establishments.
- A notarized copy of a birth certificate in english, a permission of parents or a legitimate representative and copies of identification documents are required for issuance of visa to foreigners and stateless persons under 18 holders of a passport travelling without attendance of his/her parent or a legitimate representative.
- For foreigner applicants must have a residence for at least 6 months in Egypt.
Important notice:
- No multiple entry for this visa type.
- Any documents requiring translation will be translated by the Azerbaijan embassy before submitting the documents to VFS.
- When filling out the application, all required images must be uploaded correctly. The images should be clear, properly oriented, and must not be tilted or upside down.

If Applicant purpose of Journey is for Tourist for Azerbaijan
Important Information for Diplomatic and Official passport holders.

Important Information for Diplomatic and Official passport holders.

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa application form (filled out through the visa application portal –www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az (https://www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az/)).
- Passport or other travel document (a validity period of a passport or other travel document should exceed a validity period of an expected visa at least by 8 to 10 months) and copies of their main pages.
- Two color photographs (3x4cm) matching with biometric identification requirements.
- A copy of medical insurance certificate.
- Document certifying payment of a state fee.
- A passenger flight Ticket for the whole duration.
- A copy of the application of the inviting party (state bodies of the Republic of Azerbaijan, legal entities operating in the Republic of Azerbaijan or natural persons engaged in individual entrepreneurial activity, branches and representations of foreign legal entities) approved by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Azerbaijan (on the bases of a verbal note addressed to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Azerbaijan, extended to guests of the Embassy of the Arab Republic of Egypt in the Republic of Azerbaijan).
- For foreigner applicants must have a residence for at least 6 months in Egypt.

- No multiple entry for this visa type.
- Any documents requiring translation will be translated by the Azerbaijan embassy before submitting the documents to VFS.
- When filling out the application, all required images must be uploaded correctly. The images should be clear, properly oriented, and must not be tilted or upside down.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
- A business visa is required if during any portion of your visit you intend to conduct business or commercial activities, e.g. conferences, meetings, training
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- A business visa is required if during any portion of your visit you intend to conduct business or commercial activities, e.g. conferences, meetings, training

## Visa Fees
Please note that VFS Global offers an additional optional service for visa applicants in Egypt. VFS charges an extra service fee for this service, to be paid by the applicant.
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge of 1265 EGP (Inc. VAT)

## Documents Required

- The fee for the processing of multiple-entry visa applications of the citizens of the Republic of Korea is 150 US dollars.
- The prescribed fee for the processing of multiple-entry visa applications of the citizens of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan is 200 US dollars.
- The fee for the processing of visa applications submitted by citizens of the Swiss Confederation and the Kingdom of Norway is 35 euros.
- In accordance with bilateral intergovernmental agreements, a visa-free regime is applicable for citizens of the relevant foreign countries holding diplomatic or service (or official/special) passports (
Annex 1
);
- In accordance with bilateral intergovernmental and multilateral international agreements, a visa-free regime is being applied for citizens of the relevant foreign countries holding diplomatic, service (or official/special) and ordinary passports (
Annex 2
);

## Documents Required

- Visa application form (filled out through the visa application portal –
 
www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az (https://www.visaapplication.mfa.gov.az/)
).
- Passport or other travel document (a validity period of a passport or other travel document should exceed a validity period of an expected visa at least by 8 to 10 months) and copies of their main pages.
- Two color photographs (3x4cm) matching with biometric identification requirements.
- A copy of medical insurance certificate.
- Document certifying payment of a state fee.
- A certified copy of the inviting party’s application approved by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Azerbaijan (inviting party may include state entities of the Republic of Azerbaijan, scientific research institutions and educational institutions registered by the state).
- For foreigner applicants must have a residence for at least 6 months in Egypt.

## Processing Time
Visa applications are processed within 15 days from the date of submission (this provision is regulated by the national legislation of the Republic of Azerbaijan)
Visa applications from citizens of European Union member states are processed within 3 calendar days from the date of document submission.
